case_title: LUSTIG JEROME VS JONG TONY OWNER J J AUO PARTS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WOO CALVIN OWNER RICHARDSON AUTOMOTIVE SERVICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUSTIG JEROME IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JONG TONY OWNER J J AUO PARTS WOO CALVIN OWNER RICHARDSON AUTOMOTIVE SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
